sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97254" key="stroggulotomi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρογγῠλο-τομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n97254.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">operation for abscess</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
